violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the coffee service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC directed staff to refill. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The hand-washing sink in the coffee service area was lacking paper towels. PIC directed staff to refill. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC stated the automatic dispenser was not dispensing at the proper concentration; PIC used tablets instead. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -walk-in gaskets -open air case vents. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter and leaf debris. Refuse areas must be maintained to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC closed dumpsters. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The floors in the following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and debris: -under the beverage lines (back room) -under the racks of the reach-in refrigeration. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in coffee bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen, and across from the ice machine were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, and ice from other ice machines will be used. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (wet towel on counter) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Single service items are stored on surfaces that are not clean in the bins used for storing cups & lids. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The cold slide case was not in good repair, duct taped. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: bakery favorites case cold drawers lid & cup storage bins The relish bins have an accumulation of sticker & adhesive residue. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of trash, litter, and debris. The dumpster enclosure must be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The floors especially beneath market shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the front service area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2024
